hero.title: Industrial electrical, without compromise.
hero.subtitle: Automation, preventive maintenance and 24/7 emergency service for manufacturers, food plants and data centers. Guaranteed availability, certified engineering.

services.title: Four domains, one standard
services.subtitle: Every project is led by a licensed master electrician. Detailed reports, firm quotes, no surprises.

industrial.title: Industrial electrical
industrial.description: High-capacity installations, medium-voltage distribution, CSA and Canadian Electrical Code compliance.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Allen-Bradley and Siemens PLC programming, HMI, SCADA integration, production line retrofits.

maintenance.title: Preventive maintenance
maintenance.description: Annual plans, infrared thermography, power quality analysis, long-term service agreements.

emergency.title: 24/7 emergency
emergency.description: Critical troubleshooting with 2-hour on-site response on Montréal island, 4 hours in the surrounding area.

projects.title: Work that speaks for itself
projects.subtitle: Hover each card to reveal the project in color. Every mandate meets manufacturing deadlines — the plant doesn't stop for us.

manufacturing.title: Bottling line — Anjou
manufacturing.summary: Complete 600 V switchboard retrofit and PLC automation delivered in 6 weeks.
manufacturing.alt: Refurbished 600 V switchboard in a bottling plant in Anjou, industrial photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

food-plant.title: Food processing plant — Laval
food-plant.summary: NSF compliance upgrade and conveyor automation with zero production downtime.
food-plant.alt: Automated conveyor line in a food processing plant in Laval, industrial photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

datacenter.title: Tier III data center — Ville-Saint-Laurent
datacenter.summary: 2N redundant distribution, 800 kVA UPS, centralized energy monitoring.
datacenter.alt: Redundant electrical distribution room of a Tier III data center, technical photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

warehouse.title: Logistics warehouse — Pointe-aux-Trembles
warehouse.summary: Smart LED lighting, occupancy sensors, 38% energy bill savings.
warehouse.alt: Logistics warehouse with industrial LED lighting, photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

switchgear.title: Busbar replacement — East Montréal
switchgear.summary: 12 kV swap operation completed within an 18-hour maintenance window.
switchgear.alt: Technician performing a 12 kV busbar replacement during scheduled maintenance, photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

automation.title: Siemens S7 retrofit — Longueuil
automation.summary: Legacy S5 migration to S7-1500 with new touch HMIs.
automation.alt: Newly installed Siemens S7-1500 PLC cabinet with touch HMIs, technical photograph shown in greyscale and revealed in color on hover

contactCta.title: One industrial project. One firm quote. One point of contact.
contactCta.subtitle: Every request is reviewed by a licensed master electrician. Reply within 24 business hours for quotes, within 2 hours for emergencies.
contactCta.trust_line: RBQ 5678-9012-34 · CMEQ member · $5 M liability coverage

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Électro-Maître Industriel complies with Québec's Act 25 on the protection of personal information in the private sector.
privacy.data_body: Name, email, phone, company name, description of need (within the scope of quote requests and contracts).
privacy.purposes_body: Quote request processing, contract execution, project tracking, billing, anonymized usage analytics.
privacy.retention_body: Quotes and commercial exchanges are kept for 7 years (Revenu Québec tax requirement). Navigation data is kept for 24 months maximum.
privacy.rights_body: You may request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time by contacting our officer.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.host_value: Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States

cookies.banner_body: We use essential cookies to run the site. Analytics cookies are only enabled with your consent.
